<script type="text/babel">
        const { useState, useEffect } = React;
const AD_TACTICS = ["Bandwagon", "Emotional Appeal", "Glittering Generalities", "Testimonials/Influencers", "The Halo Effect", "Facts & Figures", "Snob Appeal"];

return (
{/* HEADER */}

CALM MODULE 2

Resource Choices & Consumerism

update('studentName', e.target.value)} />
<div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto p-4 md:p-6 mt-4">

{/* TAB 0: NEEDS VS WANTS */} {activeTab === 0 && (

Learn: Understanding Resources

Everything you want to do in life requires resources. There are three main types:

Financial

Money, investments, credit, income.

Human

Time, energy, skills, intelligence.

Social

Family, friends, community support.

The Trade-Off: You almost always have to trade one resource for another. Working a job trades your Human Resource (time/energy) for a Financial Resource (money).

Game

Need or Want?

Categorize the following items correctly to proceed.

{data.needsWantsIndex < NEEDS_WANTS_ITEMS.length ? (

{NEEDS_WANTS_ITEMS[data.needsWantsIndex].name}

handleNeedsWants(true)} className="w-32"> Need handleNeedsWants(false)} className="w-32"> Want
Item {data.needsWantsIndex + 1} of {NEEDS_WANTS_ITEMS.length}
) : (

Perfect Score!

You successfully differentiated between needs and wants.

)}

updateReflection('needsWants', v)} />
setActiveTab(1)}>Next Module
)}

{/* TAB 1: CONSUMERISM & ADS */} {activeTab === 1 && (

Learn: Advertising Tactics

The Canadian Code of Advertising Standards says ads must be honest, but companies still use psychology to manipulate your "Wants" into feeling like "Needs."

  • Bandwagon: "Everyone else is doing it/buying it!"
  • Emotional Appeal: Targets fear, loneliness, or desire for happiness.
  • Testimonial: Using celebrities or "experts" to build fake trust.
  • Facts & Figures: Using statistics (even misleading ones) to sound scientific.

Apply: Ad Analyzer

Read the fake ad below. Which tactic is the company using to manipulate you?

{data.adScore < AD_SCENARIOS.length ? (
Ad {adIndex + 1} of {AD_SCENARIOS.length}

{AD_SCENARIOS[adIndex].product}

"{AD_SCENARIOS[adIndex].ad}"

{AD_TACTICS.map(t => ( ))}
{adFeedback &&

{adFeedback}

} ) : (

Immunity Unlocked!

You successfully identified all {AD_SCENARIOS.length} major advertising tactics.

)}

updateReflection('adDeconstruction', v)} />
setActiveTab(2)}>Next Module
)}

{/* TAB 2: FINANCE & BUDGET */} {activeTab === 2 && (

Learn: Paystubs & Net Pay

Before you budget, you must know your Net Pay. Your boss pays you a Gross Wage, but the government takes deductions before you see it.

  • Income Tax: Pays for schools, roads, hospitals.
  • CPP (Canada Pension Plan): Forced savings for retirement.
  • EI (Employment Insurance): A safety net if you lose your job.

Gross Pay

$2,000.00

Deductions (Taxes)

-$300.00

Your Net Pay

$1,700.00

The Budget Builder

Fill out all 3 scenarios to see how your life choices affect your money.

{BUDGET_SCENARIOS[activeBudgetTab].title} {BUDGET_SCENARIOS[activeBudgetTab].subtitle}

{BUDGET_SCENARIOS[activeBudgetTab].desc}

Hint: {BUDGET_SCENARIOS[activeBudgetTab].tips}

{/* INCOME */}

1. Monthly Income ${currentTotals.inc}

updateBudget('income', 'job', v)} /> updateBudget('income', 'loans', v)} /> updateBudget('income', 'support', v)} />

{/* FIXED EXPENSES */}

2. Fixed Expenses ${currentTotals.fix}

updateBudget('fixed', 'rent', v)} /> updateBudget('fixed', 'utilities', v)} /> updateBudget('fixed', 'internet', v)} /> updateBudget('fixed', 'transit', v)} />

{/* VARIABLE EXPENSES */}

3. Variable Expenses ${currentTotals.varExp}

updateBudget('variable', 'groceries', v)} /> updateBudget('variable', 'dining', v)} /> updateBudget('variable', 'personal', v)} /> updateBudget('variable', 'fun', v)} />
